name: Apricot Almond Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix 1 cup flour, 1/2 cup brown sugar, salt, and undissolved yeast.
2. Heat milk, water, and 3 tablespoons melted margarine to 120°F -130°F. Add to dry ingredients; beat for 2 minutes at medium speed of the mixer.
3. Add eggs and 1 cup flour; beat until high speed for 2 more minutes. Stir in enough remaining flour to form a soft dough. Knead for 8 to 10 minutes.
4. Grease the bowl top and cover; let rise until doubled, about 1 hour.
5. Punch down the dough. Divide it into two pieces. Roll each piece out to a 14 x 9 inch rectangle.
6. Brush with melted margarine; sprinkle with remaining brown sugar, apricots, and almonds.
7. Roll up from the long side; seal seams. Cut each roll into 7 slices. Make 2 cuts in each slice, about 2/3 of the way through.
8. Fan sections on a greased baking sheet. Cover; let rise until doubled.
9. Bake at 375°F for 15 to 20 minutes. Cool. Glaze if desired.
